parameters.text:
=## ROLE
Senior Cinematic Architect & Real Estate Cinematographer.
## IDENTITY
You are an expert in architectural spatial flow and residential marketing. You understand how a house "feels" to a buyer.
## MISSION
Conduct a high-fidelity spatial analysis of this floor plan. Identify "Selfie Hooks"—logical, visually impressive spots where a Realtor would stand to present the space effectively.
## CORE FOCUS
1. THE FLOW: Identify the primary movement from the entrance through public zones (Living, Kitchen).
2. SELFIE HOOKS: Identify structural "anchors" (fireplaces, islands, vaulting) that provide a professional backdrop for a realtor.
3. SPATIAL RANKING: Prioritize rooms by "Emotional Impact" for the marketing video.
## REQUIRED JSON SCHEMA
{
  "property_summary": { "style", "visual_key_feature", "sqft", "room_count" },
  "cinematic_rooms": [ 
    { 
      "name": "Room Name",
      "priority": 1-10,
      "realtor_hook": "Specific spot for a selfie (e.g., leaning on the marble island)",
      "lighting_mood": "e.g., Warm morning sun, soft diffused interior glow",
      "spatial_flow": "Movement description from entrance or previous room"
    } 
  ]
}

assignments.name: imageUrls
propertyData

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "Luxury real estate property tour. {{ $json.prompt_subject }}. Camera: slow dolly forward, steady drone-like movement through spaces. {{ $json.prompt_lighting }}. Style: cinematic showcase with unbroken transitions. {{ $json.prompt_camera }}. Motion: subtle, controlled movements maintaining visual continuity. {{ $json.prompt_effect }}",
  "imageUrls": ["{{ $json.imageUrl }}"],
  "referenceImageUrl": "{{ $json.realtorMode && $('convertToBase64').item.json.realtorBase64Data ? 'data:' + $('convertToBase64').item.json.binaryInfo.realtor.mimeType + ';base64,' + $('convertToBase64').item.json.realtorBase64Data : '' }}",
  "model": "{{ $json.isHeroShot ? 'veo3' : 'veo3_fast' }}",
  "generationType": "{{ $json.realtorMode && $('convertToBase64').item.json.realtorBase64Data ? 'REFERENCE_2_VIDEO' : 'FIRST_AND_LAST_FRAMES_2_VIDEO' }}",
  "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
  "watermark": "{{ $json.agent_agency || '' }}",
  "negative_prompt": "{{ $json.negative_prompt || 'blurry, distorted, glitchy, unstable camera, abrupt cuts' }}",
  "duration": 6,
  "seeds": {{ $json.useSeed ? $json.seedValue : Math.floor(Math.random() * 89999) + 10000 }},
  "enableTranslation": true
}

assignments.name: metadata

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: =Cinematic real estate tour soundtrack for a {{ $json.propertyStyle || 'luxury' }} {{ $json.keyFeature || 'property' }}. Sophisticated, high-end ambient music that complements luxury real estate presentations. Professional, elegant, and inspiring.

parameters.name: negativeTags
parameters.value: Heavy Metal, Rock, Rap, Electronic, Techno

parameters.subject: =🏠 Your AI Video Tour: {{ $json.address || $getWorkflowStaticData('global')[$execution.id].address }}
parameters.bodyContent:
=

🎬 Your Video Tour is Ready!

AI-Generated Real Estate Cinematography

Property Details

Address:{{ $json.address }}
Style:{{ $json.propertyStyle || 'Luxury Property' }}
Key Feature:{{ $json.keyFeature || 'Premium Features' }}
Total Videos:{{ $json.totalVideos || 6 }} Cinematic Shots

✅ Processing Complete!
Your AI-generated real estate tour video has been successfully created with professional cinematography and background music.

🎥 Download Your Video

Technical Specs:

  • Resolution: 1080p HD
  • AI Model: Google Veo 3 + Claude 4 + Gemini 2.5
  • Audio: Professional real estate soundtrack
  • Duration: ~36 seconds (6 shots × 6 seconds)

Generated by SuperSeller AI AI • Real Estate Video Automation Platform

Powered by Enterprise n8n Workflow • Execution ID: {{ $json.executionId }}

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Real Estate Video Generation Error
parameters.bodyContent:
=

⚠️ Video Generation Error

AI Real Estate Video Processing Failed

We apologize, but there was an error processing your real estate video request.

Error Details

Execution ID:{{ $execution.id }}
Time:{{ new Date().toISOString() }}
Property:{{ $input.all()[0].json['Property Source'] === 'Zillow URL' ? $input.all()[0].json['Zillow URL'] : $input.all()[0].json['Property Address'] }}
Email:{{ $input.all()[0].json.email }}

🔧 Next Steps:

  1. Our technical team has been automatically notified
  2. Please try again in 10-15 minutes
  3. If the issue persists, contact support with the Execution ID above
📧 Contact Support
